chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-262 of 2016 Const. Petition No.D-4676 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on CMA 13131/2015 2.For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024 None present for the petitioners in both matters. Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondents-SIDA. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioners are called absent. Learned counsel for respondents- SIDA and learned AAG submit that petitioners themselves are involved in theft of water and are in illegal occupation of the government land; against whom various FIRs have been registered and these petitions have been filed only to blackmail and put pressure upon the SIDA officials. Be that as it may. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners, these petitions along with pending application(s) are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
